title: neolitsea cassia
intro: Neolitsea cassia, also known as Chinese spice tree or cassia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Neolitsea cassia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
